data.name: MMA Life Simulator
data.detailed_description:
1.0.0 Version of the game has below Content

  • 160,000+ words of total dialogue

  • 6,000+ images

  • 380 animation / video files

  • 21,000+ SFX & audio files

  • 40,000+ lines of custom code

  • 4 girls who you can add to your hareem after completing all their side quest

  • Some NPCs and Locations are Under construction.. will be added with future updates.

Altho this is not Labeled as Early Access game but treat it as Early access
NSFW games are hard to be in Early access these days with new rules... 

Game will get updated every 3 month and will get more NPCS + Side quests
( Players feedback will play huge role in which character get their story advanced )

Try not to be abusive please <3. discord is active and we are replying and trying our best... Thank you

Fight for dominance. Control desire.

Take what the world owes you. Step into the brutal underground of mixed martial arts as a young fighter clawing his way out of poverty, crime, and betrayal. In MMA Life Simulator, fists are only one weapon power, money, and sexual control decide who truly wins. Every punch you throw, every woman you influence, and every moral line you cross shapes your rise.

This is a story about strength, corruption, lust, and control.

A World of Violence, Sex, and Consequences

Train your body to perfection in the gym, dominate ranked opponents in the cage, and build a reputation that opens doors or breaks them down.

Outside the arena lies a city filled with temptation and decay:

• Shady alleys • Brothels and illegal businesses

• Women with needs, ambitions, and secrets

• Power dynamics that can turn affection into obedience

Your choices decide whether relationships become romance, dependency, exploitation, or something far darker

Women, Power & Desire

Interact with multiple adult female characters, each with their own personality, limits, and paths.

You can:

• Manipulate women,

• Dominate women,

• Breed them.

This is an adult game that does not shy away from taboo fantasies and morally corrupt paths player choice determines how far you go.


Women & Romance Interests

Gameplay Systems

MMA Combat & Progression

Train, fight, level up, and defeat increasingly dangerous opponents to climb the rankings.

Story-Driven Visual Novel

A branching narrative filled with betrayal, ambition, and sexual tension.

Adult Content & Power Dynamics

Explicit scenes unlocked through relationship control, dominance, obediance and corruption.

Business & Crime

Run shops, manage brothels, exploit fame, and turn sex, violence, and money into leverage.

Morally Grey Choices

Every decision affects story routes, character loyalty, sexual outcomes, and your grip on power.

Harem Management

Shape your household into a place of love, lust, obedience, or chaos with multiple women under one roof.

The Truth Behind the Blood Uncover the mystery behind your father’s downfall and Dana’s betrayal while deciding what kind of man you become, a champion, a tyrant, or something far worse.

You sexual desires have not limits.

In MMA Life Simulator, strength alone won’t save you.

Control is everything and everyone.

data.short_description: Step into the shoes of a young aspiring fighter facing other fighters. To survive and protect your loved ones, you must enter the renowned world of fighting. Every choice you make, from intense training to accepting risky challenges has an effect on your favorite girls.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: no
  • VR 支援: no
  • 備註: no
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Quad Core
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: no
  • VR 支援: no
  • 備註: no

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 High Sierra
  • 處理器: dual core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any integrated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: dual core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any integrated GPU
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: no
  • VR Support: no
  • Additional Notes: no
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Quad Core
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: no
  • VR Support: no
  • Additional Notes: no

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.13 High Sierra
  • Processor: dual core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any integrated GPU
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: any
